missing_coverage: No test case for email format validation (missing requirement, but should be considered)
No test case for password complexity beyond length (e.g., uppercase, numbers, special characters)
No test case for email verification/confirmation step
No test case for maximum password length boundary
No test case for password confirmation mismatch
No test case for empty email or password fields
No test case for special characters or SQL injection in email/password
duplicate_testcases: TC002 and TC004 both test duplicate email rejection; TC004 is redundant as it covers the same scenario with slightly different validation timing
recommendations: Add test cases for email format validation (e.g., missing '@', invalid domain) to address the risk of invalid email addresses.
Add test cases for password complexity (uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character) to mitigate weak password risk.
Add test cases for email verification/confirmation flow if required by the system.
Add boundary test for maximum password length if defined.
Add test case for password confirmation mismatch (if confirmation field exists).
Add negative test cases for empty email and empty password fields.
Add security test cases for SQL injection, XSS in email/password fields.
Remove or merge TC004 with TC002 to avoid duplication; TC002 already covers the duplicate email rejection scenario comprehensively.
Clarify expected error messages in test cases (e.g., exact wording for 'Email already registered' and 'Password must be at least 8 characters').
Add test case for case sensitivity of email uniqueness (e.g., 'Test@Example.com' vs 'test@example.com').
